events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known as Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! The man behind the beat for countless classics.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian Harold May, the iconic guitarist for Queen, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Sir Brian May! His riffs continue to inspire.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, the electrifying frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Celebrating the 83rd birthday of the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast music video.

angles.name: MTV Revolution
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Milestone
angles.copy: Celebrating 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. A timeless album that defined a generation.

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, becoming a defining moment of the counterculture generation.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What a moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, died on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who we lost 49 years ago today. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur shooting
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, dying six days later. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago this week, the music world was rocked by the shooting of Tupac Shakur. His powerful voice and influence remain.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, the groundbreaking guitarist, died on September 18, 1970, and would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago this month. A true visionary who redefined the electric guitar.

events.title: The Beatles release Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles delivered the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. Still sounds as fresh as ever.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll original.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad for it!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock and roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary (1975 UK)
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released in the UK. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music listening.

angles.name: Music in your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed how we listen to music forever. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.
